case_title: BANK OF AMERICA NT & SA VS. RICARDO GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA NT & SA
